title: node-exporter
description: node-exporter documents installation material for node_exporter in the infrastructure domain. It is classified as an operation page for the observability-system class, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights 설치, Helm, kube-prometheus-stack, Fluent Bit, and Metrics, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include prometheus, node-exporter, fluent-bit, install, and infrastructure, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is infrastructure / observability / node-exporter / install, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation. Use it for quick orientation, implementation reminders, and deeper research.
